_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Hero
_meta.description: This Hero component is a visually engaging introduction section designed for an animal-themed website. It features a soft, curved light-green gradient background that gently fades in on load, creating a calm and natural atmosphere. At the top, a badge highlights the theme — “Discover the Animal World”. The main heading and supporting paragraph invite users to explore fascinating creatures and learn about wildlife. Action buttons guide visitors to start exploring or access animal data, while an embedded video player showcases captivating animal footage, making the experience more immersive and interactive.
